category_sources: source_facts.description says tools for manipulating next-generation sequencing data; official HTSlib site says Samtools is a suite for interacting with high-throughput sequencing data.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is samtools; official HTSlib/Samtools documentation uses Samtools and SAMtools.
docs_sources: Official HTSlib documentation page hosts SAMtools manuals and links to the samtools manual page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/samtools/samtools; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies next-generation sequencing data; official HTSlib/Samtools docs describe SAM/BAM/CRAM and high-throughput sequencing workflows.
